# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVER', description: 'Production server address')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', description: 'Path on the production server to deploy the artifact')
    }
    environment {
        SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID = 'your-ssh-credentials-id'
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def artifactName = artifactUrl.tokenize('/')[-1]
                    sh "curl -O ${artifactUrl}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/')[-1]
                    sshagent([env.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        sh """
                            scp ${artifactName} ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                            ssh ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER} 'cd ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} && tar -xvf ${artifactName}'
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
